title: chrysogonum dichotomum
intro: Chrysogonum dichotomum, also known as Green Adder's Mouth, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. Green Adder's Mouth has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever reduction, wound healing, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been used to harness its medicinal properties.
